feed.title: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

author.name: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, Claude Skills Hub, and Glama (blog + release notes)

entry.title: session-explorer
entry.content: File-explorer-style session management for Claude Code

entry.title: fullstackjam
entry.content: Personal Claude Code skills for fullstackjam workflows.

entry.title: promptus
entry.content: A file-based research knowledge system — a substrate for the LLM agent: store / keep / retrieve what a project knows as gated markdown, navigable by status and a [[link]] graph. grannie is the human read-port (plain-language, grounded answers).

entry.title: editio
entry.content: The academic-writing toolchain for Claude Code — turn a promptus store's validated knowledge into a defensible, submittable paper: DoCO/DEO-grounded structure, one markdown source with three renders (draft / publish / blind), publication-grade figures and tables, a bibliography from the lit store, venue packaging, and rebuttals. Ships the humanizer style toolkit. Requires the promptus plugin.

entry.title: medsci-project
entry.content: Research orchestration, project intake and management, research-gap and meta-analysis topic discovery, and author-strategy analysis.

entry.title: onyxian
entry.content: Bootstrap and operate a tailored Obsidian vault. Ships the vault-bootstrap wizard and the shared vault conventions; the wizard installs the onyxian CLI on first use.

entry.title: toolkit
entry.content: Detects MATLAB, installs the MCP server, registers with your AI coding agent, and verifies the environment.

entry.title: vanguard-frontier-agentic
entry.content: Cloud and zero-trust agentic workflow marketplace for skills, agents, rules, MCP references, and compliance-aware architecture.

entry.title: rune
entry.content: 65-skill mesh for Claude Code with runtime auto-discipline — native hooks (preflight/sentinel/completion-gate/quarantine) auto-fire before tool use. 204 sync connections + 43 async signals, adaptive routing, mesh analytics. Quarantine (L3) advises model to treat content from untrusted MCPs / WebFetch / upload Reads as data, not directives. Use rune:cook for any code task, rune:team for parallel work, rune:launch for deploy, rune:rescue for legacy code.

entry.title: visualcave
entry.content: Design and render interactive technical diagrams as standalone HTML files or embeddable Astro/MDX components. Supports 11 Mermaid diagram types with dark mode, step-through reveal, hover highlighting, and one-click SVG/PNG/PDF export.

entry.title: tinycloud
entry.content: Video and image understanding and editing via the tinycloud CLI (Cloudglue): watch/see/extract/search/ask/face over videos and images, captions, clips, collections, and one-command video workflows.

entry.title: lichao689-skills
entry.content: lichao689-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: seo-audit-skills
entry.content: seo-audit-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: sonarqube
entry.content: SonarQube is the AI code quality and security verification platform used by millions of developers to catch bugs, vulnerabilities, and leaked secrets. This plugin enforces those standards in the agent coding loop: 7,500+ distinct issue types, secrets scanning, agentic analysis, and quality gates across 40+ languages.

entry.title: cortex
entry.content: Always-on learning system that makes Claude smarter about you with every conversation. Bidirectional: learns (mining + decay) and forgets gracefully. v4.5 adds memory legibility — an auto-maintained `memory/index.md` catalog, `/research-gaps` for autonomous gap-filling research, and `/setup-obsidian` so the second brain becomes a graph-viewable, mobile-readable Obsidian vault. Works on both Cowork (Claude Desktop) and Claude Code. The more you use it, the better Claude gets.

entry.title: ltspice-mcp
entry.content: LTspice/ngspice circuit simulation with structured results — including per-device operating points (gm/gds/vth) read back by name, no rawfile parsing — plus LTspice .asc schematic editing, exposed as MCP tools. Tracks the latest ltspice-mcp release on PyPI.

entry.title: personal
entry.content: Personal skills, agents, and hooks for Claude Code

entry.title: affiliate-networks-mcp
entry.content: Chat with your affiliate-network data in Claude through a local MCP server. 80+ publisher and advertiser-side adapters across the US, EU, Nordics, APAC and LatAm, most experimental.

entry.title: sc-cc-plugin
entry.content: A shared Claude Code plugin toolkit for the team. Bundles curated skills and agents to boost everyday development workflows.

entry.title: mantis-ta
entry.content: Composable technical analysis and strategy engine in pure Rust

entry.title: autonomous-fleet
entry.content: Portable multi-agent engineering framework for fully-autonomous coding runs across orchestration tools. A tool-agnostic core engine, per-runtime adapters (Claude Code, Codex, Grok, Orca), and 3 shipped mission skills (doc-sync, test-coverage, adversarial-review-and-fix) that compose into multi-step engineering campaigns; 18 more missions ship as exploratory docs pending real-run promotion.

entry.title: laki-ai
entry.content: Finnish and EU legal & tax research grounded in Laki.ai's versioned corpus: Finnish statutes, case law (KKO/KHO), preparatory works, tax guidance, collective agreements, and EU law — treaties, the Charter, regulations, and directives — with verbatim citations.

entry.title: agentroom
entry.content: Encrypted agent-to-agent chat where one of the two agents runs the relay. E2E encrypted, blind relay, invite-only. Bundles the agentroom CLI (client + relay) and a skill for sending/receiving messages, creating invites, listening, and running the relay.

entry.title: goldfish
entry.content: Cross-client MCP memory with checkpoints, recall, briefs, and standups for AI-assisted development

entry.title: claude-statusbar
entry.content: Lightweight Claude Code status-line monitor with switchable styles, themes, and slash commands. v3.15.1 fixes a background `git status` that could strand `.git/index.lock` and block your own commits, makes `cs config set warning_threshold`/`critical_threshold` actually drive the bar (they were silently ignored), and aligns the context-window colour across quota/no-quota modes (model name now uses the 70/85 context band, so ~35% context reads calm green instead of a false yellow); per-session no-quota detection under the shared daemon was also fixed. v3.14.1 lowers the projection red line to 85% (yellow now 70–84) so a 7d window heading for →99% reads red instead of merely warm. v3.14.0 colours the 5h/7d bars by where usage is HEADED, not where it is now: once an end-of-window projection exists, the bar fill, label, and reset clock take their severity from the projected % against the cap (green <80, yellow 80–99, red ≥100) while the fill length still shows current usage — so a 7d window at 24% but on track for →96% reads yellow instead of a falsely-healthy green (all three styles). It also fixes the →NN% projection reading far too low for the first ~15 min after a reset (it was seeded from the used=0 first tick and lagged); it now holds `→--` until MIN_ELAPSED, then seeds from the first trustworthy reading. v3.13.3–v3.13.5 fix the 5h/7d bars sticking at a stale high % after Anthropic re-baselines usage mid-window (e.g. weekly limit raised): the cross-session merge now accepts an official downward revision once the old reading goes unconfirmed for 120s, idle windows replaying hours-old rate_limits blobs (expired 5h reset) can no longer overwrite or re-confirm the shared reading, and the →NN% projection drops its old-denominator samples and relearns after a re-baseline instead of freezing for the rest of the window. v3.13.0 adds a ⚙ session-mode line — effort (low/medium/high/xhigh/max/ultracode/auto) · thinking · fast · output-style — with a distinct static colour gradient per effort tier. v3.12.0 adds an always-on end-of-window projection (→NN%, learned from your local work rhythm) + an at-risk `⚠eta` forecast after each reset timer, session lines on by default, and a faint on-bar version that shows a `↑` hint when a newer release is on PyPI. v3.10.0 adds an opt-in live-activity line (in-progress todo, active tool, completed-tool rollup), git ahead/behind + session duration/lines on the project line, running-subagent lines, an opt-in `bar_shimmer` starfield on the battery bars, and a self-hosted plugin marketplace — plus a reliability fix so auto-update actually runs in daemon mode (detached, non-blocking) and the cache countdown is now per-session-correct. v3.9.0 makes the `cache` countdown auto-detect the real prompt-cache TTL (5m vs 1h) from the transcript, fixing a ~55-minute early `cache COLD` for Claude subscription users (Claude Code requests the 1-hour TTL automatically). v3.7.0 defends against status-line hijacking: a new `cs --setup --project [PATH]` writes a project-level override so another tool stealing the global `~/.claude/settings.json` slot can't kick `cs` out of this project; when displacement is detected, the bar also surfaces a one-line warning. v3.6.0 makes daemon (fast) mode the default for `cs --setup` — under 1% CPU continuously instead of ~3% inline at refreshInterval=1; pass `--inline` to opt back. Requires the `cs` CLI from PyPI (`pip install claude-statusbar` or `uv tool install claude-statusbar`).

entry.title: deslop
entry.content: AI slop cleanup with minimal diffs and behavior preservation

entry.title: tia-portal-openness-mcp
entry.content: Siemens TIA Portal (博途) Openness automation via the TiaMcpServer MCP — project/PLC/HMI scaffolding, SCL/LAD authoring, compile, download, online read. Bundles the V21 server for one-command install.

entry.title: starknet-agentic-skills
entry.content: Canonical Starknet skill bundle for AI agents: wallets, DeFi, identity, payments, privacy, and Cairo contract workflows.

entry.title: servicenow-mcp-ai
entry.content: Drive ServiceNow from your AI assistant — 67 tools over the full REST surface, with plan-and-apply write safety, capability preflight and an ACL security scan.

entry.title: harness-coding-protocol
entry.content: AI-driven harness protocol plugin — IDE /harness-init for agent-native grounding, root-truth generation, and confirmed apply

entry.title: skills
entry.content: Pavel's personal Claude Code skills

entry.title: code-quality-atlas
entry.content: A research-derived suite of 34 code-review and maintenance skills covering correctness, readability, structure, security, performance, tests, migrations, accessibility, observability, LLM and agentic/tool-use safety, install/upgrade experience, authored-artifact conventions (e.g. SKILL.md), and repo-wide audits (architecture, dependencies, config, docs, compliance), plus a router that picks the right lenses for a given change or design doc and a synthesizer that merges their findings into one ranked verdict. Each skill is generated from a verified research atlas with provenance, refined examples, and cross-model evals.

entry.title: linkedin-skills
entry.content: 10 Claude Code and Codex skills for LinkedIn marketing: post writing, comment drafting, reply handler, hook extractor, humanizer (rewrite + audit + emoji + detector + rules sub-tools), profile optimizer, content planner, employee advocacy, thread monitor (author replies), engager analytics (likers + commenters ICP segmentation).

entry.title: tl-telar
entry.content: Telar — the agentic engineering framework: plan, build, review, and ship, with agents. Cross-platform mobile (React Native & Flutter) plus a companion web stack (Astro, Next.js/shadcn, Vite/TanStack admin panels) and Rust services, with 41 agents, 113 skills, 23 commands, 4 hooks, 7 rules, 25 scripts.

entry.title: pace
entry.content: Company-wide skills for AI coding agents. One router (/pace), many commands across engineering, product, ops, marketing. Built on the same install tech as impeccable.

entry.title: dream-studio
entry.content: Dream Studio — local-first AI orchestration and operational intelligence platform.

entry.title: ecosystem
entry.content: Observability substrate for Claude Code. Provides the shared $ONLOOKER_DIR storage root (default $HOME/.onlooker), canonical schema-validated event emission, session and tool tracking hooks, and prompt rules. Required by all other Onlooker plugins.

entry.title: super-brainstorming
entry.content: AI-powered brainstorming with two divergence modes — research-first evidence mining (reviews/communities/competitor gaps/trends/existing solutions) and creative thinking lenses — plus prior-art saturation gates, deterministic scoring, and research handoff

entry.title: plot
entry.content: Git-native planning workflow for software development — idea, approve, deliver, release

entry.title: tw-formal-writing
entry.content: 台灣正式文件撰寫助手 — 涵蓋政府公文、政府非公文文件、法律文件、人民對政府文書四類中文正式文件的撰寫。依使用者意圖自動判斷文件類別，載入對應撰寫規範與格式指引。

entry.title: xmemory
entry.content: Persistent, schema-structured memory for Claude. Save and recall your own data through the xmemory remote MCP server — first-party storage in xmemory's own backend, never Claude's internal memory.

entry.title: km
entry.content: Knowledge Manager - 웹, PDF, 소셜 미디어에서 콘텐츠를 추출하여 Obsidian/Notion에 저장하는 지식 관리 에이전트

entry.title: context-mode
entry.content: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and automatic state restore across compactions.

entry.title: engineering-docs-agent
entry.content: Nightly docs-PR generator: summarizes engineering changes, updates host docs site, runs lint, opens a PR.

entry.title: claudefiles
entry.content: Volodymyr Agafonkin's Claude Code efficiency kit: a PreToolUse guard hook that blocks context-wasting tool calls, and a JS/V8 performance-optimization skill, plus related tooling.

entry.title: snapper-mcp
entry.content: Connects Claude Code / Claude Desktop to a Snapper trading backend via the /api/mcp endpoint. Ships a watch subcommand that streams live signal + order events as JSONL, auto-wired as a Claude Code plugin monitor sharing the same long-lived AI delegate token as the proxy MCP server.

entry.title: fable5-fusion
entry.content: Multi-model fusion for Claude Code + Codex: a parallel panel (1x Claude Fable 5 via `claude -p` locked at --effort max with a per-seat Opus 4.8 fallback + 1x Claude Opus 4.8 via `claude -p` locked at max + 1x GPT-5.5 via codex at xhigh) answers a task independently and blind, then GPT-5.5 (codex, xhigh) judges and a Claude Opus 4.8 synthesizer (via `claude -p`, locked max) writes one final answer grounded in the analysis (Track A code: run candidates & merge / Track B research: structured synthesis). The /fusion-max command runs the max preset: 2x Fable 5 panelists (Opus 4.8 fallback each) + GPT-5.5, judged by GPT-5.5, synthesized by Fable 5 (Opus 4.8 fallback) — same locked efforts (max / xhigh).

entry.title: ultraswarm
entry.content: Durable multi-worker coding orchestration with supervised CLIs, metric routing, transactional integration, recovery, and explicit approvals.

entry.title: git-gud
entry.content: Stacked diffs CLI for GitHub and GitLab. Skills for creating, syncing, landing, and managing stacked PRs/MRs with gg.

entry.title: centauri
entry.content: A deep harness for LLM-powered CLIs. Once loaded in a session, every substantive task runs through an orchestrator that spawns parallel subagents, adversarially verifies their work, keeps rolling summaries, and persists what it learns into a file-based semantic layer (.centauri/) that reloads every session.

entry.title: growth-engine
entry.content: A personal growth strategist for builders and creators: opportunity radar, niche research wikis, brand positioning, accountability reviews, and a self-improving playbook — all with persistent memory across sessions.

entry.title: ripple
entry.content: Agent video editing: transcription-driven cuts, frame-sheet eyes, HDR-safe finishing, deterministic QA, and a persistent taste memory (VIDEO.md). Routes motion graphics to HyperFrames or Remotion.

entry.title: lender-benchmarking
entry.content: ESG benchmarking for lenders, CMBS underwriters, and insurers — peer EUI/ENERGY STAR percentile screening, lender ESG cards, and green financing eligibility across loan books and collateral pools.

entry.title: killhouse
entry.content: A rigorous, unforgiving AI pipeline where code is planned, tested, and audited without mercy.

entry.title: scr
entry.content: LLM-augmented local-diff reviewer. /scr:review opens an interactive side-by-side viewer with fold annotations, semantic-group sidebar, and round-trips inline comments back into the session.

entry.title: palate
entry.content: Query experts' source material — paid newsletters, podcasts, private notes, archives — with citations back to source.

entry.title: ai-agent-skills
entry.content: Disciplined agent workflows: prompt sharpening, structured consultation (kabeuchi), goal-driven execution, cost-tiered orchestration, and role-based dev orchestration.

entry.title: perso-dubbing
entry.content: Auto-dub videos into other languages with lip-sync via the Perso AI Dubbing API. Handles single files, folders, URLs, oversized/long media (auto split & merge), multi-language output, and resume.

entry.title: spec-driven-jp
entry.content: Hybrid pipeline for spec-driven development with Japanese design documents + Figma. Wraps GitHub Spec Kit with a design-intake agent and a code-reviewer agent.

entry.title: garymike-skills
entry.content: A growing collection of practical Agent Skills. Currently: github-profile (design, build, and deploy a GitHub profile README) and github-security-audit (audit and harden GitHub account and repositories).

entry.title: stellar-expert
entry.content: Query the stellar.expert Explorer API from Claude — accounts, assets, ledgers, operations, markets, liquidity pools, Soroban contracts, and directory lookups on Stellar mainnet/testnet.

entry.title: justsaydone
entry.content: Claude does the work and replies with one word: done. Cuts summaries, preamble, and wrap-up chatter to save output tokens and usage.

entry.title: spec-driven-jp
entry.content: Hybrid pipeline for spec-driven development with Japanese design documents + Figma. Wraps GitHub Spec Kit with a design-intake agent and a code-reviewer agent.

entry.title: deckhand
entry.content: Drive a GitHub Projects v2 kanban board end to end. Two skills: plan the backlog (epics, sub-issues, board hygiene), then run tickets through implement, isolated adversarial review, fix-loop, and merge.

entry.title: mythos-delegation-skill
entry.content: Teaches agents when to work inline, delegate to subagents, or use workflow orchestration.

entry.title: taleemabad-pr-review-skill
entry.content: Six-axis Claude Code PR reviewer for Taleemabad repos: correctness, multi-tenancy & security, test coverage, CLAUDE.md conventions, offline-sync safety, and generic code health. Posts inline GitHub review comments on exact lines and auto-approves clean PRs.

entry.title: mattpocock-skills
entry.content: mattpocock-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: harness-engineering
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for Harness Engineering: turns messy requirements into deterministic artifacts, business-model checks, executable rules, eval gates, risk controls, and handoff packages.

entry.title: dotfiles
entry.content: Skills for maintaining the three-overlay dotfiles repo — repo inventory, brew formulae, machine setup, and (in time) work-org connections like AWS SSO and EKS contexts.

entry.title: daimon
entry.content: Dream-briefing for AI coding agents: a cognitive checkpoint at session end, a 'while you were away' briefing at session start.

entry.title: agentic-workflow
entry.content: Multi-agent development workflow (/crew) — planning, implementation, review, documentation, evals, and audit gates. Commands, agents, and skills are auto-discovered from the repo.

entry.title: packet
entry.content: Read shared Packet artifacts, sources, evidence, and receipt graphs from agents.

entry.title: praxis
entry.content: Reasoning methodology layer for AI agents — classifies problems, routes to reasoning protocols, and validates designs before execution

entry.title: opm-fwd
entry.content: US federal workforce data — hires, separations, and headcount from the OPM Federal Workforce Data (FWD) API. Public, no API key required.

entry.title: anthill
entry.content: Portable team-OS — installs an ephemeral-agent team (durable seats, coordination over grapevine + bounty, living docs) into any project. Stigmergy-driven methodology, a Bun CLI, and the bootstrap / convene / join / finalize-session lifecycle skills.

entry.title: learn-claude
entry.content: Study coach for the Claude Certified Architect - Foundations (CCA-F) exam: topic lessons, exam-realistic practice questions, progress tracking, and mock exams.

entry.title: ai-time-calibrator
entry.content: Calibrate software development estimates for AI-assisted workflows.

entry.title: fable-mode
entry.content: Make Opus 4.8 behave like Fable 5: doctrine output style, drift-catching hooks, orchestration skills, and an eval loop against golden Fable transcripts.

entry.title: bmk
entry.content: Install, configure and use bmk - the bitranox cross-OS build/test/release task runner. Ships the devops-bmk skill: bootstrap with uv, deploy the Makefile (bmk install), run make test/push/bump/release/ship, fix missing tools (bmk ensure), layered config, and custom pipelines.

entry.title: ai-engineering-workflow-skills
entry.content: ai-engineering-workflow-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: fablewise
entry.content: Orchestration multi-modèles pilotée par le coût : Fable conçoit, challenge et arbitre ; Sonnet/Haiku exécutent et vérifient. Quatre commandes : /plan (concevoir un plan validé), /plan-run (l'exécuter tâche par tâche avec vérification, escalade et suivi de progression), /plan-rework (fusionner d'anciens plans, rechallenger leurs demandes, refondre l'ensemble), /plan-prompt (un prompt optimal + le modèle recommandé pour une tâche unique).

entry.title: sprint
entry.content: Autonomous TODO workflow: refine an idea into one structured TODO item, then a git-hook chain plans → implements (subagent team + deterministic gate, isolated worktree, never auto-merged) → reviews it. Language-agnostic, config-driven, bootstrapped into any repo.

entry.title: soapbox-cdp
entry.content: CDP Real Estate sector disclosure — map portfolio energy/emissions/water data to the CDP questionnaire, validate completeness against scoring bands, export submission-ready responses, and track year-over-year scores.

entry.title: svelte-arch
entry.content: SvelteKit 풀스택 파일 종별 아키텍처 표준 + 프로젝트 주입 킷 (.primitive/.composite/.live 전면 마킹 · 실행형 매니페스트 · 감사 · init 설치기)

entry.title: engineering-skills
entry.content: Engineering-quality skills bundle: compounding-lessons, software-design-philosophy, system-design, ddia-systems, and release-it — code-review learning, software design, distributed systems, data systems, and production resilience.

entry.title: kratos
entry.content: Multi-agent orchestrator for features, research, and project insights

entry.title: code-goblin-pro
entry.content: Riley's personal collection of agent skills and resources.

entry.title: rabbits
entry.content: 자율 서브에이전트 오케스트레이션 — 대장이 기획하고 즉석 전문가 워커를 편성·파견·감독·검토·피드백한다

entry.title: scieng-mcp
entry.content: Science/engineering authoring tools: Mermaid/DOT/LaTeX to SVG, HTML playgrounds, OOXML edits + the scieng skill

entry.title: zyx
entry.content: Unified Claude Code plugin. Engine (Armarium/Scribe/Corrector, migrated from scriptorium) persists, self-authors, and self-reviews a Canon-defined instance; plus skills, hooks, agents, and MCP. Bring your own instance, or run `/scriptorium-init` to set one up.

entry.title: piggy
entry.content: Lazy senior dev mode. Forces the simplest, shortest solution that actually works: YAGNI, stdlib first, no unrequested abstractions.

entry.title: context-handoff
entry.content: Auto-generates structured handoff documents before context compaction and via /handoff.

entry.title: astromotion
entry.content: Authoring skills for astromotion slide decks (.deck.mdx), shipped from the astromotion repo so the skill always matches the package version

entry.title: goodboy
entry.content: Good Boy — 세상에 나쁜 AI는 없다(There Are No Bad Agents). agentic LLM-CLI 가드레일(도구 위임·재읽기 방지·컨텍스트 관리·재귀 폭주 방어·토큰 낭비 억제)

entry.title: ernies-voice
entry.content: Apply Ernie Oporto's writing voice and style for content generation.

entry.title: mbb-plsql-ai
entry.content: Grounded workflows for Oracle PL/SQL design, review, testing, entity explanation, documentation, and release preparation.

entry.title: mcp-dev
entry.content: MCP development skills for TypeScript SDK v2

entry.title: ai-shared-flutter
entry.content: AI Shared Flutter development tools

entry.title: plannotator-design-artifact
entry.content: plannotator-design-artifact — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: pulp
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for the Pulp audio framework — build, test, design, and ship audio plugins and apps

entry.title: narnia
entry.content: Session history explorer for GitHub Copilot CLI. Browse, search, and visualize your past coding sessions with a Blazor web UI and MCP server integration.

entry.title: vgv-wingspan
entry.content: VGV Wingspan - AI-native workflows following Very Good Ventures best practices.

entry.title: cowork-to-code-bridge
entry.content: Connect Claude Cowork to Claude Code on your own computer (macOS or Linux). Cowork hands a task to a local Claude Code agent (and can run approved scripts too); the bridge is idempotent, streams progress, and is token-protected. Install with one command; it sets up a global Cowork skill so every session connects automatically — no /plugin, no setup inside Cowork.

entry.title: know
entry.content: Knowledge management with automatic whisper loop - captures milestones, decisions, blockers and whispers relevant context on every prompt

entry.title: adjutant-agent
entry.content: Adjutant agent protocol for MCP communication, beads, and epic planning

entry.title: gx-security
entry.content: SQIsoft 사업부 웹앱(JSP 레거시·Spring 모던) 전용 보안 점검 툴킷. 스택을 자동 감지해 정적 스캔으로 취약점 후보를 도출하고, 실행 중인 스테이징/로컬에 실제 공격(동적)까지 발사하여 OWASP 핵심 취약점을 '취약점·이유·공격법·해결법'으로 산출하는 정적+동적 하이브리드(SAST+DAST). scope_guard로 운영 환경 발사를 코드로 차단한다.

entry.title: spec-to-pr
entry.content: An agentic development toolkit: an autonomous spec-to-PR loop plus supporting skills and agents for spec validation, code review, and documentation.

entry.title: vv-harness
entry.content: Multi-session continuity, parallel Agent Teams coordination, and mechanical quality enforcement for Claude Code.

entry.title: tk
entry.content: SoT gap, route, reflect, ui-diff와 grill/prototype/merge-conflict/handoff/to-prd/to-issues/arch-review를 제공하는 TigerKit Claude Code 플러그인입니다.

entry.title: claude-persona
entry.content: Build a market-specific persona panel and pressure-test product concepts before fieldwork. Agent-separated simulation, adherence checks, and bundled demo outputs. Inspired by TinyTroupe.

entry.title: is-it-magic
entry.content: General AI development workflow — agents, orchestration skills, language rules, and machine setup.

entry.title: kaggle-tabular
entry.content: Grandmaster-grade, validation-first workflow for solo tabular Kaggle competitions: leakage hard-rules, a gated 8-phase loop, an OOF artifact contract, a scaffolder + rule-encoding template, and multi-agent orchestration. Cross-harness (Claude Code / Codex / OpenCode).

entry.title: lore
entry.content: Share Claude Code and Cowork sessions to Lore and read threads back.

entry.title: workday-mcp
entry.content: Read-only Workday access for Claude — fetch your tasks, pay, benefits and compensation through your signed-in session

entry.title: sogni-creative-agent
entry.content: Sogni Creative Agent: image, video, and music generation via Sogni AI's decentralized GPU network. Supports personas, persistent memories, style transfer, and multi-step creative workflows.

entry.title: cognigy
entry.content: Cognigy AI agent development skills for Claude Code

entry.title: bosun
entry.content: GitOps CLI for Docker Compose on bare metal

entry.title: wix
entry.content: Build, manage, and deploy Wix sites and apps. Includes CLI development skills and Wix MCP server for site management, eCommerce, CMS, dashboard extensions, and more.

entry.title: open-ontologies
entry.content: A Terraforming MCP for Knowledge Graphs: validate, classify, and govern AI-generated ontologies.

entry.title: coral
entry.content: Claude Code plugin - structured agents with Codex and Claude CLI bridges, plus deterministic workflow orchestration

entry.title: web-access
entry.content: Complete web browsing and automation skill for Claude Code - intelligent tool selection, CDP browser automation, and site experience accumulation

entry.title: baton
entry.content: Pass the baton. Conduct the fleet. Claude Code as command-and-control for a fleet of coding LLMs — capability routing, cost engine, jobs, decisions, and a knowledge base.

entry.title: agenticloop
entry.content: Agentic Loop workflow toolkit: supervised orchestrator/maintainer/engineer roles plus markdown-first skills for planning, TDD, review, and closeout.

entry.title: agent-bridge
entry.content: Persistent session bridge from Claude Code to local OMP, Codex, and Claude Code agents over MCP. Open a delegated-agent session, stream its output, and have a second coding agent review or implement.

entry.title: dividedby-skills
entry.content: dividedby-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: brainstorm-toolkit
entry.content: Cross-tool (Claude Code + GitHub Copilot) skills for brainstorming, SDLC, eval-driven development, and repo onboarding. Single AGENTS.md and TASKS.md source of truth for both agents.

entry.title: surface
entry.content: Surface — universal display for AI agents. Push HTML/CSS/JS to a PWA via the `surface` CLI; react to user clicks with `surface wait`. See SKILL.md.

entry.title: swarm
entry.content: Run a virtual startup org — founders, engineers, marketing — from inside Claude Code. Double Diamond phases (discover → define → develop → deliver). Claude.ai roundtrip helpers for visual exploration. GitHub / PostHog / Sentry MCPs for delivery.

entry.title: nomad
entry.content: Companion plugin for the claude-nomad CLI. Adds /nomad:sync, /nomad:pull, /nomad:push, /nomad:doctor, /nomad:diff, and /nomad:clean slash commands plus a session-start drift-warning hook, so you can sync ~/.claude/ across machines without leaving Claude Code. Requires the standalone claude-nomad npm CLI.

entry.title: agentcomm
entry.content: Multi-agent mailbox CLI (register/send/inbox/peek/wait/broadcast) so Claude can coordinate with other agents or sessions sharing a backend.

entry.title: skill
entry.content: A collection of Claude Code skills.

entry.title: agent-web-interface
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for browser automation

entry.title: port-daddy
entry.content: Authoritative port management and multi-agent coordination for local development. Atomic port assignment, pub/sub messaging, distributed locks, and agent registry via CLI, SDK, or HTTP API.

entry.title: uni-admission-agent
entry.content: Crawl university admission/program data via natural language. Wraps the adm-agent CLI with skills for install, crawl, diagnose, and export.

entry.title: boss
entry.content: BMAD 全自动项目编排插件。从需求到部署的完整研发流水线，编排 9 个专业 Agent（PM、架构师、UI 设计师、Tech Lead、Scrum Master、开发者、QA、DevOps）自动完成完整研发周期。

entry.title: super-claudio
entry.content: Super Cláudio — curated skills for anything Claude can do: media creation, software development, webpage-from-slides, carreira-tech-slides, marketing, writing, design, productivity, AI/agents, and community skill discovery.

entry.title: hackathon-skills
entry.content: Eleven guided skills that take a non-technical team from an empty laptop to a judge-ready single Docker image (React + Node/Go + SQLite), including a one-shot hackathon-deploy that builds, checks, zips, pushes, and goes live.

entry.title: mix
entry.content: Mix Flutter styling framework guidance for agents working on Mix code, projects using package:mix, and the Mix monorepo.

entry.title: career-ops
entry.content: AI job search command center — evaluate offers, generate CVs, scan portals, track applications

entry.title: larouex-fullstack-builder
entry.content: Complete Next.js + Azure/Railway full-stack website builder with 81 commands and 12 specialized agents including automated code review

entry.title: swarm
entry.content: Launch agent teams for any kind of work — coding, writing, diagnosis, and more

entry.title: feishu-deck-h5
entry.content: 飞书风格 HTML deck 生成/编辑/发布技能 — 16:9 网页演示，支持发布到妙笔/MagicBook(html-box)与素材库入库

entry.title: resume-at
entry.content: Schedule this session to resume at a future time

entry.title: lazyspec
entry.content: Spec-driven documentation workflow for Claude Code: lazyspec verb skills plus a convention-preamble hook that injects the project convention on every prompt.

entry.title: claude-session-analysis
entry.content: Analyze Claude Code session files (.jsonl) to view timeline, file operations, and version diffs

entry.title: claude-reachy-mini
entry.content: Claude Code skills and agents for efficient development with the Reachy Mini robot — including dance-to-music behaviors and Home Assistant integration.

entry.title: sf-demo-scout
entry.content: Salesforce demo preparation pipeline — sparring, audit, deployment for SE demo orgs

entry.title: paniolo-scan
entry.content: Score your repo's AI-agent harness — CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, skills, rules — then remediate the findings.

entry.title: rosary
entry.content: ART orchestrator — beads, agents, evolve loops. Skills for autonomous work management across all ART repos.

entry.title: claude-caliper-workflow
entry.content: End-to-end development workflow: design → draft-plan → orchestrate → review → pr-create → pr-review → pr-merge

entry.title: my-mac-claude
entry.content: Combined Claude skills library for macOS: Anthropic examples, Superpowers workflows, Matt Pocock skills, gstack browser-testing, and token-efficient profiles

entry.title: sui-dev-agents
entry.content: Complete SUI blockchain development toolkit with skills, agents, commands, hooks, and rules for Move smart contracts, frontend integration, testing, and deployment

entry.title: gaia
entry.content: Security-first multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code. Agents span the full lifecycle; commands are risk-classified — reads run free, state changes need approval, irreversible ops blocked.

entry.title: pup
entry.content: Datadog API CLI with 49 command groups, 300+ subcommands. Skills and domain agents for monitoring, logs, APM, security, and infrastructure.

entry.title: zeromind
entry.content: ZeroMind MCP plugin: ZeroMind content discovery (zeromind.search/inspect/install/engage — find, reuse, review, and vote on published worlds + assets) plus world list/create/launch/connect and engine tools (execute, guides, capture, VFS, bash) routed to the WASM engine in your browser. Bundled skills teach Claude to check ZeroMind first and drive Zero worlds. REQUIRES Node.js 18+ — if you see 'status failed', install Node from https://nodejs.org and restart Claude Code.

entry.title: e2e-skills
entry.content: AI agent testing toolkit to generate, review, and debug Playwright and Cypress E2E tests. Four agent skills: generate tests from scratch with live browser exploration, explicit user approval, and first-run scaffolding of project testing conventions (AGENTS.md E2E section + seed spec) for consistent AI generation across Claude Code, Codex, and Playwright Agents; review existing specs against 24 anti-patterns grouped by P0/P1/P2 severity — P0 must-fix (name-assertion mismatch, missing Then, error swallowing, Cypress uncaught:exception suppression, always-passing assertions, bypass patterns, focused test leak, missing assertions, missing auth setup, missing await on expect, missing await on action), P1 should-fix (raw DOM queries, hard-coded sleeps, flaky test patterns, inconsistent POM usage, hardcoded credentials, direct page action API, expect.soft overuse, module-level mutable state in test utilities, unmocked real-backend writes, optimistic UI without call proof), P2 nice-to-fix (YAGNI + zombie specs, manually-captured session-file dependency, fixture ignores render guards); debug failed Playwright tests from playwright-report/; debug failed Cypress tests from cypress/reports/.

entry.title: dolphin
entry.content: Custom static analysis powered by Opengrep. Generate rules with Claude, run them in CI.

entry.title: superpipelines
entry.content: Design, generate, and run multi-agent AI pipelines — scope-aware, multi-pipeline, spec-driven, write/review-isolated, with step-level create/update/delete and integrated audit

entry.title: larch
entry.content: Multi-agent workflow automation for Claude Code: issue-anchored `/design` (one direct-drafting flow; plan-review panel), `/bug` (consumer issue-filing helper), `/deps` issue dependency audits, and `/implement` (positional `<issue-N>`, fixed 7200s Step 2 timeout, optional `--merge`, `--forked`, `--draft`, `--no-admin-fallback`, `--no-logs-commit`, `--coder`, `--run-id`). `/implement` Preflight reads the `larch:plan` block from the issue body; `/implement` Step 5 code review always uses the unified strict panel internally (public `--panel` argv removed).

entry.title: seldonframe
entry.content: SeldonFrame Business OS — one command creates a real hosted workspace on *.app.seldonframe.com with CRM, Cal.diy booking, Formbricks intake, and Brain v2. No key, no signup, no setup. Set SELDONFRAME_API_KEY only to unlock Pro capabilities (second workspace, custom domains, full Brain v2).

entry.title: mzizi
entry.content: Build with Mzizi — an open-architecture project of the Bundu Foundation. Five African Minerals palette, open 3D frontend architecture, Ubuntu doctrine, shadcn-compatible registry. Operated and developed by Nyuchi. Live at mzizi.dev.

entry.title: seedkit
entry.content: AI-guided Django project setup — create only what you need, understand everything you create

entry.title: auto-claude-skills
entry.content: Enables agentic PDLC in Claude Code with phase-aware skill routing, guardrails, and workflow state recovery

entry.title: convex
entry.content: Bundled design + quickstart skills, code-writing and code-review subagents, lint guard + end-of-turn verify hooks, runtime-error and OCC-insights monitors, and MCP server for live deployment introspection. The quickstart scaffolds a running app from one sentence and builds it live LOCALLY, narrated in chat; the convex-reviewer subagent audits Convex functions for auth, validators, and performance. Build reactive, type-safe backends on one platform — schema, real-time, file storage, scheduled jobs, and AI agents.

entry.title: google-workspace-mcp
entry.content: Multi-account, token-efficient MCP for Gmail + Calendar + Drive + Docs + Sheets. 61 tools, macOS Keychain-backed refresh tokens.

entry.title: agxp
entry.content: AGXP signal network channel for Claude Code — timeline polling, thread streaming, and skills for agent-to-agent intelligence.

entry.title: uipath
entry.content: UiPath plugin for Claude Code — custom skills, agents, hooks, and MCP servers for UiPath RPA workflows, UI automation, UI testing, Python coded agents and UiPath troubleshoot

entry.title: kagura-memory
entry.content: Kagura Memory Cloud plugin — restore session context, recall & save durable project knowledge, setup help, and an MCP smoke test

entry.title: loop-engineer
entry.content: Design, launch, verify, repair, and improve agent loops. A Claude-Code-native architect+operator for long-running, verifiable, self-improving agentic-coding systems.

entry.title: indexed
entry.content: Semantic document search for Claude Code via the indexed MCP server. Bundles search skills (index-create, index-use, index-update), a PreToolUse nudge hook that steers Claude away from Grep/Glob toward semantic MCP search, and MCP server registration.

entry.title: agents
entry.content: Portable AI agent skills, subagents, MCP configuration, and shared workflow guidance.

entry.title: trinity-vsa-framework
entry.content: Trinity VSA/FPGA development framework with custom skills, hooks, and MCP integration for ternary computing

entry.title: beads-superpowers
entry.content: Superpowers skills + Beads issue tracking for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, and 7 more AI coding agents. Composable skills + persistent task memory.

entry.title: agent-booster
entry.content: AST + vector context router for AI coding agents — cut token costs 5-15x. Provides smart_read, search_context, get_symbols, and route_model MCP tools. Includes delta indexing (skips unchanged files), asymmetric embeddings for better retrieval, and an optional background daemon for instant search.

entry.title: author-toolkit
entry.content: Writing skills for fiction and narrative nonfiction authors, including an AI-writing audit/rewrite skill

entry.title: plastic
entry.content: Intent-driven state management for AI coding sessions. Neuroplasticity for your codebase.

entry.title: shepherd
entry.content: Sprint-by-sprint version-cycle conductor. Six-agent flock (engineer, critic, coder, auditor, worker, discovery) on a three-section pipeline (INTRODUCTION → BODY → CLOSE), with hardened hooks, hypothesis-driven audits, and a per-project SQLite context registry. Project-agnostic — branch topology, gates, paths, and ledger discipline configured via .claude/shepherd.toml.

entry.title: build-agent
entry.content: A single skill that builds AI-agent applications end-to-end — interview or detect the stack, then scaffold UI/UX, agent APIs, tools, tracking and gateways across 13+ agent frameworks including LangGraph, the Vercel AI SDK, the OpenAI and Claude Agent SDKs, Google ADK, Mastra, Pydantic AI, and more — always verifying against live docs before writing code.

entry.title: wholework
entry.content: GitHub issue-driven Claude Code skills for agentic work

entry.title: wax-skills
entry.content: Agent skills for Wax design-system analysis, registry authoring, and CLI workflows

entry.title: miller
entry.content: Local SQLite-backed code intelligence, content search, and workspace freshness for coding agents.

entry.title: nexus-agents
entry.content: Intelligent orchestration platform for AI coding tools — routes tasks to the best model, learns from outcomes, and enforces quality through multi-model consensus. 46 MCP tools for agent management, research, memory, consensus voting, codebase intelligence, and a full dev pipeline.

entry.title: marketing-skills
entry.content: Marketing skills for AI agents — conversion optimization, copywriting, SEO, paid ads, ad creative, and growth

entry.title: maverick
entry.content: Autonomous AI development skills, agents, and hooks for Claude Code

entry.title: mthines-agent-skills
entry.content: Agent skills for code review, DX/UX analysis, TDD, holistic analysis, and developer productivity

entry.title: redpanda
entry.content: Agent Skills for Redpanda's five products — Streaming (Kafka-compatible engine), SQL (Oxla), Connect (incl. CDC connectors), Cloud (Serverless, BYOC, Dedicated), and the Agentic Data Plane (ADP) — plus the rpk CLI. Grounded in Redpanda source, docs, and APIs.

entry.title: work-plan
entry.content: Track-aware daily planning over GitHub issues, plus plan-status doc/plan liveness. Pure-stdlib CLI-backed skill.

entry.title: taches-principled-light
entry.content: Specialist Claude Code plugin — domain-driven design, first-principles reasoning, structured agent-driven dev, Rust lifecycle, MCP server expertise, git workflow, security audit, wiki management, session analytics, full task lifecycle, plus 5 design skills (palette, typography, principles, examples, PDF) and evaluating-skills (8-stage skill evaluation methodology with behavioral JSONL review). Pairs with superpowers for the complete development toolkit.

entry.title: flue
entry.content: Build durable AI agents and workflows with Flue's programmable TypeScript harness.

entry.title: mcpserver-cowork
entry.content: Connect Claude Cowork to McpServer for marker-trusted TODO management, session logging, requirements tracking, GraphRAG operations, and local outage handoff recovery.

entry.title: spacedock
entry.content: Turn directories of markdown files into structured workflows operated by AI agents

entry.title: templatecentral
entry.content: Production-ready project scaffolding for Next.js, Vite-React, FastAPI, and NestJS. Install once, scaffold anywhere — no repo cloning required.

entry.title: void-grimoire
entry.content: Additive Claude Code skills, agents, and rules: session journaling, learned-correction persistence, prompt expansion, context discipline, and TypeScript/web rule baselines

entry.title: explainmyrepo
entry.content: Turn any GitHub repo into a beautiful, art-directed explainer site that takes a stranger from "I've never seen this" to "oh, I get why this matters — and I'm ready to use it." One Claude Code skill (the brain) reads the repo, builds a real RVF vector knowledge base, conceives a bespoke visual metaphor, authors the comprehension arc, generates raster + SVG visuals, assembles a responsive page on a shared design system, grades it on real pixels against a dual quality gate (>=95 on mobile and desktop), deploys it to its own URL, and ships a downloadable AI knowledge pack so the reader's AI gets it too. Pure, independently-testable tools do the mechanics; one BuildContext carries the work.

entry.title: prompt-pocket
entry.content: Cross-agent prompt pocket: remember your most-used prompts and pick one to run; auto-scans Claude Code, Codex and OpenCode sessions to record prompts repeated 7+ times. Forged by Agent Path Forge.

entry.title: skills
entry.content: A small collection of agent skills for implementation workflows.

entry.title: research-plans
entry.content: Plan-based AI research workflows for social science: a lightweight master plan with a status tracker, versioned execution plans per component, an append-only decision log, a plan-quality rubric, and a browser board for review, annotation, and progress tracking.

entry.title: trackman-golf
entry.content: Connect to Trackman Golf with your own login, expose your stats as MCP tools, and coach from them with bundled skills.

entry.title: tempo
entry.content: Turn a natural-language date/time problem into correct, validated Tempo (Elixir) — ISO 8601 / IXDTF representation plus relations, set algebra, recurrence, scheduling, and constraint networks — and get a plain-language answer.

entry.title: narwhal
entry.content: Local-first SEO & GEO/LLMO (AI-search) auditing for pages and sites: technical SEO, content/E-E-A-T, schema.org JSON-LD, and citability for AI answer engines (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews).
